column8: Smoking isn't allowed in the airport. You ______ smoke in the airport.
column9: It's not necessary to come to the train station to meet me. You _____ meet her at the train station.
column10: We were forced to wait for over two hours in the rain! They _____ wait for over two hours in the rain.
column11: The instructions tell you to write in pencil. You _____ write in pencil.
column12: You can contact us by either phone or email. You _____ phone them.
column13: In my country, you can carry your passport with you if you want, but it's not necessary. In her country, you _____ carry your passport with you.
column14: My grandfather was made to start work when he was just fourteen years old. He ____- start work when he was just fourteen years old.
column15: It's not necessary to book a hotel; you can stay in our spare room. You ______ stay in a hotel.
